---
title: "Data gathering"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(devtools)
library(hockeyR)
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
pdp <- load_pbp('2018-19')
head(pdp, n= 10)
```

```{r}
write_csv(pdp, "PBP2018-2019.csv")
```


```{r}
TEST <- read.csv("/Users/jacobkasten/Desktop/STAT331_Jacob_Kasten/PBP2018-2019.csv")
head(TEST, n= 4)
```
